episode0.title: THE POD — DIRECTOR'S CUT V5 UPGRADED

event1.text: I'm standing close enough to see frost crawling off the glass.

event2.text: There is a body shape inside. Not a shadow. Not a reflection.

event3.text: I want to move closer. I also want to run until the station runs out of floor.

event4.text: Operator, pick one before I do something stupid with confidence.

event2.text: My boots are sticking to the deck. Condensation froze in patches.

event3.text: If I fall in front of the most important corpse-or-not-corpse in history, delete the footage.

event1.text: I hate it. Which probably means it's the correct call.

event3.text: Channel is cleaner. The pod sounds like someone breathing through a wall.

event0.text: Before anyone touches the chamber: scan first.

event1.text: Cryostasis is not sleep. It is a machine convincing a body not to leave.

event2.text: Wake it wrong and you can save the lungs while losing the person.

event4.text: I said what my fear said before my manners caught up.

event2.title: OCCUPANT MEDICAL SCAN
event2.content:
NAME: NOAH VOSS
STATUS: ALIVE
HEARTBEAT: DETECTED
NEURAL ACTIVITY: LOW BUT PRESENT
CRYOSTASIS STATE: UNSTABLE
WAKE RISK: HIGH
PRESERVATION RISK: RISING
event2.caption: Medical scan recovered from emergency pod system.
event2.message: [OCCUPANT MEDICAL SCAN ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

event4.text: I need everyone to understand that I am holding onto that word with both hands.

event1.title: CRYOSTASIS LOCK WARNING
event1.content:
LOCK STATE: ACTIVE
SUBJECT: NOAH VOSS
INSTRUCTION: DO NOT WAKE
REQUESTED BY: ETHAN HALE
OVERRIDE STATUS: AVAILABLE
WARNING: MANUAL OVERRIDE MAY TRIGGER NEURAL SHOCK
event1.caption: Cryostasis warning recovered from pod control layer.
event1.message: [CRYOSTASIS LOCK WARNING ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

event5.text: You keep saying that like reasons don't leave bodies behind.

event1.text: Missing file. Eighth slot. Alive in a pod that Hale ordered locked.

event2.text: I don't know whether to laugh, scream, or punch the glass until my hand stops being useful.

event0.text: I locked him because he asked me to.

event1.text: Noah was awake for maybe thirty seconds before we sealed him.

event2.text: He looked at me and said, 'If I start making sense, don't trust me.'

event3.text: That is a very Noah sentence.

event4.text: It was. That's why I believed it.

event1.text: I'm angry enough to shake and scared enough to pretend it is only anger.

event2.text: Noah used to sing during reboots. Badly. Like the song owed him money.

event3.text: If he's in there, I don't get to leave him as a memory because memories are easier to handle.

event0.text: The pod is giving us two workable options.

event1.text: Slow wake: safer for his mind, rougher on the failing chamber.

event2.text: Hard wake: faster, but Hale looks like he might reach through the channel and strangle the command line.

event3.text: Because the command line deserves it.

background1.text: Good. Slow is not cowardice here. Slow is precision.

event2.text: He's moving. Not much. Fingers first.

event1.text: I hate this choice. I'm doing it anyway.

background1.text: Noah, if you can hear me, I'm sorry.

event3.text: He's convulsing. No, no, stay with me—

event0.text: Don't let him near the black box.

event2.text: I remember screaming. I remember Hale's hand on the lock.

event3.text: And now I remember waking wrong.

choice0.text: NOAH, WE HAD TO RISK IT.

event0.text: Then do not let him near the black box.

event1.text: You always were dramatic after naps.

event3.text: Or something wearing enough of him to be dangerous.

event1.text: Noah, listen to me. You're in an emergency pod. You're alive.

event2.text: Alive is a suspiciously strong word for how I feel.

event0.text: You sound like every person who ever made a bad call and survived long enough to name it necessity.

event2.text: But I'm alive. So I will be angry later.

event0.text: The black box isn't just a recorder.

event1.text: It heard the command that started Alpha. It stored the voice before the station learned to lie.

event3.text: Under the pod cradle. Behind the emergency battery housing.

event4.text: Of course it is under the thing trying to kill us.

background1.text: Back out if it moves again.

event2.text: Got it. Also lost a glove seam. If I start leaking atmosphere, complain loudly.

background1.text: Noah, can you see the cradle from inside?

background2.text: I can see frost. I can see my hands. I would rather see neither.

event2.text: Arm has it. Slow, but clean. For once, a machine behaved like it had parents.

event0.title: BLACK BOX RECORDER
event0.content:
CORRUPTED

RECOVERY POSSIBLE

DECRYPTION MODULE REQUIRED.

Linked Subject: NOAH VOSS
Linked Event: INCIDENT ALPHA
Warning: access may expose suppressed command audio.
event0.caption: Recovered black box recorder connected to Incident Alpha.
event0.message: [BLACK BOX RECORDER ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

event1.text: YOU WERE NEVER SUPPOSED TO FIND NOAH

event4.text: And whatever Hale says next... make him prove it.
